title: Amtech U0750 Deluxe Garden Shears with Comfort Grips
features: DURABLE: These deluxe garden shears have hardened carbon steel blades with a non-stick coating and a blade tension adjuster
COMFORTABLE: The shaped wooden handles have non-slip cushion grips for extra comfort
VERSATILE: With a useful hanging hole in handle, these shears are ideal for cutting hedges, bushes and overgrown shrubbery
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for shrubs, flowers, and soft plant stems
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
description: From the manufacturer Product Description This classic garden shear design is ideal for taking care of your garden plants and shrubs, by giving them a really clean cut. Great tool for professionals or gardening enthusiasts for shaping hedges and pruning bushes. The carbon steel wavy blades cut the hedges easily and finely. The non-stick coated blade aids a smooth cutting action without any sliding. Reasons to Buy!! Perfect for plants, shrubs, and hedges. Less friction and smooth functionality : This edging garden shear has a non-stick coating, that effectively manages friction to give you a smooth cutting action. Precision Cutting : The tool comes with wavy carbon steel blades that stay sharper for a longer, giving you a precision cut every time. The structured blade and comfort grip assist in preventing the tool from sliding when in use. Hence, it gives you a uniform finish. Top Quality : This garden shear is made from premium quality materials.
